The container
Container 1

Cuboid

This is our first smart container designed for collecting cans with incentives. It works especially well in places where waste is poorly managed.

People scan a QR code to open the container, and they receive money in the Augeas app when they deposit cans. Inside, AI-powered cameras check that the correct waste is inserted.

When the container is full, the collected cans are sold to aluminum recyclers. A full container can generate up to €1,000 worth of cans.

Each container has a capacity of 1.5 m³.

€1,200€1,000

Live demo — April 2026

See it in action

This is our product as of April 2026. The container is fully operational on the UCLouvain university campus in Belgium, with real users collecting cans every day. We're actively developing and improving the product, and this is just the beginning.

Regional deployment

We deploy where demand is strongest

Our target: reach 20 containers ordered in a single region. Once that threshold is met, Augeas establishes a local presence — on-the-ground support, logistics, and community management included. Every pre-order in your region brings us one step closer to installing there, and tackling garbage pollution.
